title: Shared privileged accounts and incomplete PIM coverage
description: Six shared admin accounts identified for legacy database administration; Azure AD PIM not enforced for two Azure Subscription Owner roles. Last formal privileged access review occurred 10 months ago.
notes: PAM solution (CyberArk Essentials) procurement approved; rollout planned in Q1 2026.

title: Incomplete SIEM coverage and insufficient log retention
description: Two production VPCs not sending VPC Flow Logs to SIEM; application logs retained for 90 days vs policy requirement of 180 days.
notes: Terraform module update planned to enable flow logs and increase retention.

title: Critical vulnerabilities exceeded remediation SLA
description: Three Linux hosts exceeded the 14-day SLA for critical CVEs in October 2025 (CVE-2025-XXXX).
notes: Backlog cleared by 2025-12-10; patch cadence adjusted; added escalation to weekly ops review.

title: Policy review cycle missed by one month
description: Information Security Policy review occurred in November instead of October. No impact identified.
notes: Calendarized to recur each November; Board notified.

title: Gap in documented restoration tests for CI infrastructure
description: No documented restoration test for GitLab runner configuration backups.
notes: Plan to run and document a restoration test during 2026-02 maintenance window.

title: Training completion below target
notes: Completion reached 98% by 2025-12-05 after reminder campaign.
